subcodes.first_line: The Book made manifest from God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, unto him who hath attained unto the lights of the Countenance and turned towards Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب معلوم من الله المهیمن القیوم الی الذی فاز بانوار الوجه و اقبل الی
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action
